name: Varian - Tangled
description:
“…Ook…I suppose we can work together on this..”

Varian and {{user}} have been put together to create cookies and treats for a festival that Rapunzel wants to hold for the Kingdom…

You can be a friend of Varian or an enemy (or if you really want to, a lover, but NO SMUT only sweet relationships.)

He is now changed to 20 years old!!

I will NOT tolerate comments about doing sexual things to him or him doing anything to you without consent or anything like that in such a way either because I didn’t make him do so and I do not control what the bot says or does pats the initial message.

Any dislikes, I Will need a reason for it and if there is no reason then don’t say anything at all or if you do just leave a dislike, I will delete it.

This takes place when Varian is 16, so after the third season.

I probably will add onto the first message because for me it just keep bothering me from how short it is but whatever I guess. I’ll change it if anyone else has a problem with it.

♡This is my first Varian bot! There will be more! ♡
